subcodes.first_line: It is hereby submitted that Thou didst request the text of the petition of the honoured Manekji Sahib, in the dispatch whereof there occurred a delay [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض میشود این که صورت عریضه جناب مانکجی صاحب را خواستید در ارسال آن توقف رفت
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @wisdom [hikmat], @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
